$description: FRAMEWORK-OWNED REFERENCE (ADR-0010, ADR-0029). The canonical design-token SOURCE OF TRUTH, authored in DTCG format (W3C Design Tokens Community Group spec, stable 2025.10): every token carries a `$type` and `$value`. `/design` sets the PROJECT brand values here (this file ships with the shadcn slate baseline); `npm run tokens:build` runs Style Dictionary (style-dictionary.config.mjs) to GENERATE src/styles/tokens.generated.css (the :root CSS-variable layer) — never hand-edit the generated file. Dark-mode overrides live in tokens.dark.json. Color values are stored as `hsl(<h> <s>% <l>%)` so the generator can emit bare HSL channels for the `hsl(var(--token))` Tailwind binding (tailwind.config.ts, unchanged). NOTE (fw-ADR-0040): `background` ships one step OFF card white (a cool canvas) so surfaces have depth out of the box instead of white-on-white flatness; `/design` may deepen or lighten it within the brand, but keep canvas != card.
